locations.name: Leo's Home
locations.description: A warm, safe family home where Leo lives with his mother and father.

locations.name: Leo's School
locations.description: Leo's friendly local school, with a classroom led by Leo's teacher.

locations.name: The Forest
locations.description: A lively green forest filled with winding paths, old trees, small animals, and gentle mysteries.

locations.name: The Hidden Treehouse
locations.description: A cozy treehouse hidden among the forest branches and used by Leo and Scout as their special meeting place.

locations.name: The River
locations.description: A clear river near the forest with gentle banks, smooth stones, and safe places to explore with care.
